message:
test(gui/glyphcache): pin atlas pressure / recreate-cache eviction contract (ft-1memj.28/D, ft-1wqwb)

The bead description ("LRU evicts least-recently-used glyphs") doesn't
match the implementation. Per the comment at glyphcache.rs:568 the
GlyphCache is built around HashMaps "rather than LfuCaches; eviction is
managed by recreating Self when the Atlas is filled" — i.e. the Atlas
DOES NOT do per-entry LRU. The pre-existing
atlas_pressure_reports_growth_without_evicting_oldest_cached_color
already verifies that under pressure the oldest entry survives and the
caller gets OutOfTextureSpace. Test what the system actually contracts
to do, not what the bead title implies.

Add three targeted unit tests that pin the real contract:

* atlas_eviction_returns_out_of_texture_space_with_grow_hint
    Filling the atlas to capacity and pushing one more must produce
    OutOfTextureSpace with a non-None size hint that exceeds the
    current size. The renderer relies on that hint to decide how big
    to make the recreated atlas; if it ever stops being populated the
    recreate path can't size itself.
* atlas_eviction_does_not_evict_oldest_entry_when_full
    The inverse of the bead's LRU assumption. Fills the atlas, traps
    the OutOfTextureSpace error on the next insert, then proves every
    pre-existing entry still resolves to its original sprite coords
    AND original UV tuple. cache.color.len() must not shrink — no
    entry silently dropped or relocated.
* atlas_eviction_recreate_path_restores_capacity
    The documented escape valve. After OutOfTextureSpace surfaces with
    a grow hint, drop the old GlyphCache and build a fresh one at the
    suggested size; the previously-failing entry now succeeds and
    lands at the canonical first-slot pixel origin (1, 1).

No production change. Verified via:

  rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc6-target \
    CC=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang \
    CXX=/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ \
    cargo test -p frankenterm-gui atlas_eviction

3 atlas_eviction tests pass. Closes the fourth unit-test row in
ft-1memj.28's GPU-unrequired list, with a note in the bead reason that
the literal "LRU evicts oldest" description does not match the shipped
contract.
